---
title: "Practice makes perfect "
author: "XXX" 
date: today 
project: 
  output-dir: Output
  execute-dir: project
toc: true 
abstract-title: "Research question:"
abstract: "......"
format: 
  html: 
    embed-resources: true
    number-sections: true
    code-fold: true
editor: visual 
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
execute:
  warning: false 
  message: false
  freeze: false 
---

## Quarto

## Running Code

```{r}
1 + 1
```

```{r}
#| echo: false
2 * 2
```
